Positive 0DTE GEX (+4.43B) provides short-term stability, but negative GEX in WEEKLY_1 (-0.81B) and MONTHLY_1 (-1.66B) amplifies directional risk. Major resistance at 700, structural supports at 670-680. Max Pain clustering (684-690) suggests mean-reversion bias within this range.
